headlines.title: South Carolina’s redistricting effort fails in the state Senate with GOP opposition
headlines.description: The Republican-led South Carolina Senate on Tuesday voted against advancing a new congressional map, ending the redistricting effort in the state for now

headlines.title: John Cornyn’s last stand and Democratic fights: What to watch in Texas elections
headlines.description: Tuesday’s primary runoffs in Texas will put President Donald Trump’s endorsement to the test again — the latest step in a mission to punish some incumbent Republicans he has deemed insufficiently loyal

headlines.title: Vance calls Pope Leo’s AI warnings ‘profound’
headlines.description: In an interview with NBC News, Vance said he is glad the pope tackled AI. He also discussed why X remains off his phone after he deleted it for Lent.

headlines.title: New details on potential deal to end Iran war
headlines.description: There are new questions over how close the US is to a deal that would end the war with Iran. President Trump, who is working to open the Strait of Hormuz, says the negotiations are proceeding nicely - but Iran is sending a different message. NBC News’ Garrett Haake has the story.

headlines.title: Rubio tours India’s famed Taj Mahal amid strained trade relations
headlines.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio toured India’s famed Taj Mahal during a four-day visit at a critical time for U.S.-India relations. After bilateral talks with India’s external affairs minister, Rubio expressed optimism about future trade ties between the two countries, which were strained by President Trump’s tariff policies.

headlines.title: Swimmer 'breaks' world record at billionaire-backed Enhanced Games
headlines.description: A controversial sports event where athletes can use performance-enhancing drugs under medical supervision is raising questions after an unofficial world record swim and renewing debate over the future of fair competition. NBC News' Shaquille Brewster reports.

headlines.title: It’s not just kids: Trump’s crackdown on trans healthcare extends into adulthood
headlines.description: Conservatives have long argued they want to end transition care for minors, but federal policies have increasingly limited adult access. More restrictions are on the way.

headlines.title: Starbucks faces backlash in South Korea over ‘Tank Day’ campaign
headlines.description: Starbucks is facing backlash in South Korea over a “Tank Day” marketing campaign that evoked the country’s deadly 1980 military crackdown on pro-democracy protesters. In South Korea, Tank Day commemorates the day the country’s then-military government sent troops and tanks to supress mass rallies for democracy.

headlines.title: How an indie horror film became a box-office ‘Obsession’
headlines.description: Curry Barker, a 26-year-old YouTuber-turned-filmmaker, made his horror film “Obsession” in just 20 days on a mere $750,000 budget

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Clarence B. Jones, civil rights activist who helped write MLK’s ‘I Have a Dream’ speech, dies at 95
headlines.description: Clarence B. Jones, a top civil rights activist and lawyer who helped write part of Dr.

headlines.title: From The Sports Desk: New Yorkers rejoice as the Knicks return to the NBA Finals
headlines.description: Are the New York Knicks the best team in the NBA?
